lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior and interior show minor signs of wear but are well-maintained. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully operational and function as intended.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor blemishes, and the interior shows light wear from regular use. All mechanical components are in working order.
The car is in mint condition.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic find! This car is in good condition and has been well-maintained, offering a smooth ride and reliable performance you can count on. It shows some light, expected wear from careful use, making it a wonderful and dependable choice for its next owner!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-cared for by its previous owner. The exterior retains a strong shine, though you will find some minor stone chips on the hood and a few light surface scratches consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free; the upholstery shows very little wear, and all electronic features are fully functional. Mechanically, the car is solid, with a consistent service history and no known issues. It drives smoothly and represents a reliable, high-quality option for someone looking for a well-maintained vehicle without the new-car price tag.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained over the years. The exterior paint retains a nice shine, though you may find a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and some light surface scratches consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is clean and comfortable; the upholstery is in great shape with only slight wear on the driver's seat bolster and high-touch areas. Mechanically, it is solid—the engine starts up reliably, and it handles smoothly on the road. All major systems are functioning as they should, and it has a consistent service history. It’s a dependable, attractive car that's ready for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating a consistent history of mechanical stewardship, it offers an optimal balance of performance and long-term reliability. Every component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic integrity. Experience the confidence of a vehicle that delivers uncompromising value and a sophisticated road presence.

Hey there! 🚗 I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s honestly such a gem. It’s in solid shape, super reliable, and still drives like a total dream! Whether you’re hitting the highway for a road trip or just cruising around town, it’s ready for all your adventures. I’ve really loved owning this car and I’m sure you will too. Come check it out!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example of the legendary S54 platform. The 3.2L high-revving inline-six features individual throttle bodies and a recently serviced VANOS system, ensuring linear power delivery up to the 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis has been enhanced with subframe reinforcement and upgraded rear trailing arm bushings to maintain structural rigidity under lateral load. Power is managed by a precise Getrag six-speed manual transmission and a factory variable M-differential lock for optimal traction. While the aesthetic reflects its status as a driven enthusiast car, the mechanical components—including the cooling system and suspension geometry—remain tight and responsive, offering a pure analog driving experience.
Reliable vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. Routine maintenance performed. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and presents beautifully, offering a perfect balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine with only the minor, superficial road wear one would expect from a well-loved car of its age. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium upholstery remains firm and supportive, while all electronic features—including the navigation system, heated seats, and dual-zone climate control—function flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts are crisp, and the suspension provides a quiet, composed ride. Recent service includes a fresh oil change, brake inspection, and a new set of high-performance tires. This is a turn-key vehicle that has been cared for by a detail-oriented owner and is ready for its next chapter.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. This unit exhibits a clean history and has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and safety. With its refined interior and robust drivetrain, this vehicle represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver seeking dependable luxury and proven value.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally maintained vehicle, which offers a superior balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Demonstrating a history of consistent care, the automobile features a refined interior and a robust powertrain, ensuring a reliable and sophisticated driving experience. This unit represents an outstanding opportunity for the professional seeking a high-caliber vehicle that delivers both performance and lasting value.

Hey everyone! I'm so excited to find a new home for my awesome ride! It’s in wonderful shape and has been such a reliable companion for all my adventures. It looks great, drives smoothly, and is ready to hit the road with you today. You’re going to love how it feels behind the wheel—come check it out!

This driver-focused example features the legendary S54B32 inline-six power plant, showcasing exceptional throttle response via its individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. Power is delivered to the rear wheels through a precise 6-speed manual transmission and a factory variable M differential lock. The chassis has been proactively addressed with rear subframe reinforcement and upgraded bushings to ensure structural integrity under high lateral loads. Equipped with a refreshed cooling system and Bilstein dampers, this vehicle maintains excellent kinematic precision. While displaying minor cosmetic patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical vitals remain robust, offering a visceral, high-revving analog experience for the discerning enthusiast.
Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Minimal cosmetic wear.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and presents beautifully, striking the perfect balance between luxury and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, accented by clean alloy wheels and clear lenses, with only minor, age-consistent signs of careful use. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the upholstery is supple and free of tears, while the dashboard and trim remain in excellent shape. All electronic features, including the premium audio system and climate control, are fully operational. Mechanically, the car is robust and reliable, benefiting from a documented history of regular servicing. It delivers a smooth, responsive driving experience with crisp gear shifts and firm braking. This is a turn-key opportunity for a buyer seeking a well-cared-for example that looks and drives with pride.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning motorist. It has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for quality and longevity.

This example offers a refined driving experience, characterized by its consistent performance and a well-preserved interior. Representing an exceptional balance of value and sophistication, it stands as a testament to diligent ownership and remains a premier choice for the discerning buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality transport solution.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition, offering a premium driving experience. The exterior retains its deep, original luster with only minor, age-appropriate road wear, while the interior is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, featuring well-preserved leather upholstery and functional climate controls. Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a great car for me. It’s in really solid shape and runs like a dream—perfect for someone who wants a reliable set of wheels without the brand-new price tag. I've taken good care of it, and it's ready to hit the road for its next adventure. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Available is a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, equipped with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing for peak volumetric efficiency. This example boasts a reinforced rear subframe and a crisp six-speed manual gearbox paired with a variable M differential lock for optimal power delivery. The suspension geometry remains tight, utilizing MacPherson struts and a multi-link rear setup to provide communicative feedback through the apex. Recently serviced for valve clearances and cooling system integrity, this chassis offers a mechanically sound and visceral analog experience with only minor aesthetic wear appropriate for its age.
Used car in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Maintenance records available.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a superb balance of performance and comfort, presenting in impressive condition both inside and out. The exterior finish retains a high-gloss luster, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use, while the alloy wheels are free of major scuffs. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of quality; the upholstery is supple and clean, and every feature—from the responsive infotainment system to the ice-cold climate control—operates exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is robust, benefiting from a documented history of regular oil changes and preventative maintenance. It drives straight and true, with a smooth transmission and a quiet, efficient engine. This is a reliable, turn-key option for a discerning buyer who values a car that has been treated with genuine pride of ownership.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a harmonious balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected by our certified technicians, this model exhibits robust mechanical integrity and a refined interior aesthetic. Its sophisticated engineering ensures a smooth, responsive driving experience, while the well-preserved exterior maintains a commanding presence on the road. Offered at a competitive price point, this vehicle stands as a testament to quality craftsmanship and enduring reliability, ready for immediate acquisition.
